  • Module

SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AppLauncher
Launch the application
Assets
Utility class to get the correct asset of a card
CardColour
Enumeration that contains all the possible card colours
CardDrawnUpdate
Update to handle when a card is drawn
CardPlacedUpdate
Update to handle when a Card is placed.
CardsDistributedUpdate
Update to handle the card distribution when the match starts
ChatEvent
Event to send a message in the chat to all the other players or to a specific one
ChatUpdate
Update to handle a message in the chat
CLI
This class elaborates the commands from a CLI and creates the corresponding message to send to the Client controller.
CliCard
Class that represents the printable interface of the playing cards in the CLI, used to have a coloured command line representation
CLIClassificationBuffer
Class that contains the intermediate classification to print when every player turn ends
CLIClassificationObject
Class that defines the data to print for every player in the intermediate classification
CLIDrawBuffer
Interfaces used by all the buffers in the CLI.
CLIDrawBufferGrid
Buffer for the CLI that draws and prints the playing grid of a player
CLIDrawBufferHand
Buffer for the CLI that draws and prints the cards in the hand of the player
CLIDrawBufferTable
Buffer for the CLI that draws and prints the cards of the draw table
ClientCard
This class represents a game card on the playing grid, from the perspective client (index, position and side)
ClientController
The controller of the client.
ClientControllerRMI
RMI implementation of ClientController.
ClientControllerSocket
Socket implementation of ClientController.
ClientMessage
This class represents a message in the chat, from the perspective of the client
ClientSideSocketHandler
This class handles a socket connection on client side
ClientStub
Interface that defines the methods used by the server or the communication handler of the client to update the client about the new state of the match or lobby
CliObjCard
Class that represents the printable interface of the objective cards in the CLI, defined by a description that helps the player to understand how to do more points
CLIObjectivesBuffer
Buffer to save the printable version of the player's public and private objectives
CLIState
This enum represents the possible states of the Command Line Interface
CloseMatchConnectionMessage
This class defines the messages with the client request to close its match and server connection if it's connected by sockets
ColourCLI
The enumerations that contains the codes to colour the cards representation for the CLI
ColouredBack
This class is used to define the back of the gold and resource cards, which have an element in the center defined by their colour
ColourSelectedUpdate
Update to handle when a player chooses the colour at the beginning of the match.
CommandInstruction
This enum lists the existing commands for the Command Line Interface, binding them the required number of parameters
Condition
This class is used to define the conditions that can multiply the points of the side of the card where this condition is located.
Controller
This class is the controller of the game: its function is to coordinate the model and the views.
ControllerCreateOrJoinMatch
GUI controller to handle the actions of match creation, match joining and request of available lobbies
ControllerGUI
This abstract class defines a controller used to handle user actions from the GUI, by sending the correct message to the server
ControllerLobby
GUI controller to handle users in the lobby
ControllerMatch
 
ControllerNickname
GUI controller to handle nickname selection
Coordinate
This class represents the position in the matrix, it's used to compress the 2 coordinates
CoordinateSubmatrix
This class represents a coordinate in the submatrix to search for calculating the completions of a PatternObjectiveCard
Corner
This class defines a specific visible corner of a side of a card.
CreateMatchMessage
This class defines the messages with the client request to create a new match in the server.
DistributeCardsEvent
Event to distribute the cards to the players
DrawCardEvent
Event to draw a card
DrawTable
Contains the cards that are ready to be picked by the players, and provide the methods to draw them
DuplicateMatchException
This exception is thrown when an attempt is made to create a match, but there's already a match with the same name.
DuplicateNicknameException
This exception is thrown when a user tries to subscribe with a nickname that is already in use.
Element
This enumeration defines all the types of symbols that can be present in a corner or as a list in the center
ElementsObjectiveCard
ElementsObjectiveCard represents an objective card that requires to have a certain number of Elements in order for it to be completed: extends a general ObjectiveCard
EmptyDeckException
This exception is thrown when someone tries to draw a card from a deck, but there are no cards left.
EndGameEvent
Event to end tha game
Event
Abstract class that defines an event that allows the client to execute a model function requires method executeCommand
EventListener
Interface that defines an event listener: requires method actionPerformed
GameCard
This class represents all the cards that are playable on the playing grid of the player and contains the methods which other parts of the model can use to extract info from the card
GameEndedUpdate
Update to handle the end of the game, in order to show the results
GameModel
This class is the Model of the game.
GameStoppedUpdate
 
GetPlaceablePositionsEvent
Event for a request of placeable positions around a card
GoldFront
This class is used to define the front side of gold cards
GUI
Graphical User Interface
IllegalRequirementsException
 
IllegalStateException
This exception thrown if a method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
InvalidParameterException
This exception is thrown if a method has been invoked with an unexpected parameter.
InvalidPlacementException
This exception is thrown when the attempt to place a card fails.
InvalidSearchPositionException
This exception is thrown when trying to search for a position on the grid in an unexpected way.
JoinMatchEvent
Event to add player to the match
JoinMatchMessage
This class defines the messages with the client request to join an existing match in the server.
JSONParser
This utility class is used for parsing ObjectiveCards and GameCards from .json files
LaunchGUI
Launch the JavaFx application, with the args from ClientLauncher
LobbiesNonCompletedUpdate
Update to handle the request of non completed lobbies
LobbiesRequestMessage
This class defines the messages with the client request of the incomplete lobbies in the server that it could join
Match
Represents an ongoing match with all its components.
MatchStartedUpdate
 
Message
This class is used as an identifier of all the messages that travel through the network between client and server.
NicknameEstablishedUpdate
Update to handle the registration of a player nickname
NicknameMessage
This class defines all the first messages accepted by the server from the client.
NoMatchException
This exception is thrown when an attempt is made to look for a match that does not exist
NoNicknameException
 
NotGoldFront
This class is used to define the front of initial cards and resource cards
NotYourTurnException
This exception is thrown when trying to invoke a method for a player and it's not his turn
ObjectiveCard
This class represents a general ObjectiveCard in the game
ObjectiveSelectedUpdate
Update to handle when the player chooses the objective
PatternObjectiveCard
PatternObjectiveCard represents an objective card which requires to search for a certain pattern in the PlayingGrid in order to be completed: extends a general ObjectiveCard.
PlaceablePositionsReturnedUpdate
Update to handle when the player asks for placeable position around a card
PlaceCardEvent
Event to place a card
PlaceStartCardEvent
Event to place the start card
Player
This class represents a player in the match.
PlayerColour
The enum Player color.
PlayersAddedUpdate
Update to handle when some players have joined the lobby
PlayingGrid
This class represents the playing area of a Player
PointPosition
This utility class is used to map the scores with the corresponding position of the pion on the score board
PropertyCardInHand
The player has new cards in hand
PropertyCardPlaced
A new card has been placed on a playing grid
PropertyChange
The purpose of this interface is to notify the user interface that a change happened in the viewModel.
PropertyChatMessage
The user receives a message in the chat
PropertyClassification
The game has ended and the classification is available
PropertyDeckColour
There is a new colour of the gold deck or the resource deck
PropertyErrorMessage
The error message changed
PropertyGameStopped
 
PropertyLobbiesNonCompleted
The list of non completed lobbies has been received
PropertyNicknameSet
The nickname has been set
PropertyObjectivesToChoose
The secret objective is selected
PropertyPlaceablePositions
The player hase received a list of available positions for placing
PropertyPlayerColour
A player has a new colour
PropertyPlayersAdded
Some players joined the lobby
PropertyPlayersInMatch
All the players have been added to the match
PropertyPoints
A player has incremented his score
PropertyPublicCard
There is a new public card on the table
PropertyPublicObjective
There's a new public objective
PropertyRemainingRounds
A number of remaining rounds is set
PropertySecretObjective
The secret objective is selected
PropertyStateChange
The state of the game changed
PropertyTurnChange
The turn changed and it's another player's turn
PropertyYourTurn
The turn changed and it's your turn
RequestInstruction
This enum lists the existing commands to request some information to be show
SelectColourEvent
Event to select a colour for a player
SelectObjectiveEvent
Event to select a secret objective
Server
The server that contains all the ongoing matches
ServerSideSocketHandler
This class handles a socket connection on server side
ServerStub
Interface that defines the methods used by the client or the communication handler of the server make requests to the server
Side
This class defines all the common features and methods of the side of a card
StartBack
This class is used to define the back side of the initial cards
StartCardPlacedUpdate
Update to handle when a player places the start card
StartMatchEvent
Event to start the match
State
This class represents the state of the model
Update
Abstract class that defines and Update of the model state to update the client
UpdateListener
Interface that defines an update listener: requires method sendUpdate
UserAction
This interface represents a UserAction.
UserCreateMatch
The user wnats to create a match
UserDistributeCards
The user wants to distribute the cards in order to start the match
UserDrawCard
The user wants to draw a card
UserEndGame
A user wants to end the game
UserGetLobbies
A user wants to get the available lobbies
UserGetPlaceablePositions
A user wants to know the placeable positions around a card
UserInterface
Interface implemented by the GUI and CLI.
UserJoinMatch
A user wants to join a match
UserPlaceCard
A user wants to place a card
UserPlaceStartCard
A user wants to place a start card
UserPrivateChat
A user sends a private message in the chat
UserPublicChat
A user sends a public message in the chat
UserRequest
This interface represents a UserRequest.
UserRequestDrawTable
Show the draw table after user request
UserRequestFlipCard
Show the new hand with a flip card after a user request
UserRequestHand
Show the player's hand
UserRequestHelp
Class that responds to a user help request
UserRequestObjectives
Show the player's objectives
UserRequestPlayingGrid
Show the player's playing grid
UserRequestSwitchVisualization
Show the other visualization of the player's playing grid
UserSelectColour
A user selects his colour
UserSelectObjective
A user selects his secret objective
UserStartMatch
A user wants to start the match
UserStopGame
A user decides to stop the game
ViewModel
This class contains the client side state of the application, to be rendered by the user interface
ViewModelUpdater
An interface that defines the methods to update the ViewModel
VirtualView
This class is the server side component of the player view.
VirtualViewRMI
This class is the server side component of the player view in case of an RMI connection of the client.
VirtualViewSocket
This class is the server side component of the player view in case of a TCP/Socket connection.
VVStub
 
WrongInformationException
This exception is thrown when a method of the Model is invoked, but the parameter contain wrong information.
WrongNumberOfPlayersException
This exception is thrown when a method of the Model is invoked, but the parameter contain information for a wrong number of players.
